attachAutomationCallback.signature: void attachAutomationCallback(String automationId, var updateCallback, var isSynchronous)
attachAutomationCallback.description: Attaches a callback to automation changes. Pass a non-function as updateCallback to remove the callback for the given automation ID.

createObjectForAutomationValues.description: Creates an object containing the values for every automation ID.

createObjectForSaveInPresetComponents.description: Creates an object containing all values of components with the `saveInPreset` flag.

getSecondsSinceLastPresetLoad.description: Returns the amount of seconds since the last preset has been loaded.

isCurrentlyLoadingPreset.description: Returns true if this is called somewhere inside a preset load. This takes the thread ID into account to avoid false positives when calling this on another thread.

isInternalPresetLoad.description: Returns true if the user preset that is about to be loaded is a DAW state (or initial state). This function is only useful during the pre / post load callbacks.

isOldVersion.description: Checks if the given version string is a older version than the current project version number.

resetToDefaultUserPreset.description: Loads the default user preset (if it's defined in the project).

runTest.description: Runs a few tests that catches data persistency issues.

sendParameterGesture.signature: bool sendParameterGesture(int automationType, int indexWithinType, bool gestureActive)
sendParameterGesture.description: Sends a parameter gesture change message to the host. Returns true if the parameter exists.

setAutomationValue.description: Sends an automation value change for the given index.

setCustomAutomation.description: Enables host / MIDI automation with the custom user preset model.

setEnableUserPresetPreprocessing.description: Enables a preprocessing of every user preset that is being loaded.

setParameterGestureCallback.description: Attaches a callback to the begin and end of parameter gestures.

setPluginParameterGroupNames.description: Sets the available group names for plugin parameter groups.

setPluginParameterSortFunction.description: Sets a custom sort function for the plugin parameter order.

setPostCallback.description: Sets a callback that will be executed after the preset has been loaded.

setPostSaveCallback.description: Sets a callback that will be executed after a preset has been saved.

setPreCallback.description: Sets a callback that will be executed synchronously before the preset was loaded

setUseCustomUserPresetModel.signature: void setUseCustomUserPresetModel(var loadCallback, var saveCallback, bool usePersistentObject)
setUseCustomUserPresetModel.description: Disables the default user preset data model and allows a manual data handling.

setUseUndoForPresetLoading.description: Enables Engine.undo() to restore the previous user preset (default is disabled).

updateAutomationValues.signature: void updateAutomationValues(var data, var sendMessage, bool useUndoManager)
updateAutomationValues.description: Updates the given automation values and optionally sends out a message.

updateConnectedComponentsFromModuleState.description: Restores the values for all UI elements that are connected to a processor with the `processorID` / `parameterId` properties.

updateSaveInPresetComponents.description: Restores all values of components with the `saveInPreset` flag.
